channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Merrin tells Newsmax: Kaptur 'out of touch' after 43 years
item.description: GOP candidate Derek Merrin said Saturday he has momentum in Ohio's 9th District race against longtime Democratic Rep. Marcy Kaptur.

item.title: US Army hits 2026 recruiting goals four months early, Hegseth announces
item.description: The US Army reached its 2026 recruiting targets four months early, marking a second consecutive record year, Pete Hegseth announced at West Point graduation.

item.title: Fabela tells Newsmax: UAE showed 'tenacity' under fire
item.description: VEON founder Augie Fabela told Newsmax on Saturday that the UAE demonstrated resilience during the opening weeks of Iran's missile and drone attacks.

item.title: Trump rates new Iran peace offer a solid 'maybe,' diplomat praises progress
